title: guarea fistulosa
intro: Guarea fistulosa, also known as the Guarea tree, is a tropical plant species belonging to the family Meliaceae. Traditionally, the plant's bark and roots are used in folk medicine, exhibiting medicinal properties such as antimalarial, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Guarea fistulosa include the potential treatment of fever, pain, and various infectious diseases, as well as the reduction of inflammation and oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant's parts are often combined with other medicinal plants and used in tea infusions, decoctions, or tinctures to harness its therapeutic properties.
